targets.visualRule: A weathered wooden farm signpost, tall enough to Y-sort naturally against the player, readable as a landmark from a distance. Reuses the same 'sign' interaction kind as tile_village_interaction_sign for a consistent non-verbal navigation cue. On the 16x32 canvas the upper 16px is drawn post height and the lower 16px is the grounded footprint; the interaction box sits on that lower [0,16,16,16] footprint.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.

targets.visualRule: Small farm storage/gardening props (crate, barrel, basket) sharing one weathered-wood material story with env_farm_fence, useful for populating activity areas without new gameplay.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.

targets.visualRule: A subtle furrow/row-line overlay for tile_farm_tilled_soil that reads as an organized crop row from a distance, distinct from (and layered beneath) the existing tile_farm_crop_sprout/tile_farm_crop_harvest overlays. Must not obscure soil-state readability.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
Complements, does not replace, the already-specified tile_farm_tilled_soil/tile_farm_crop_sprout/tile_farm_crop_harvest targets.
